## Validation

- [ ] `dotnet build Cress.sln --configuration Release`
- [ ] `dotnet test Cress.sln --configuration Release --no-build`
- [ ] `node --test node/tests/*.test.mjs`
- [ ] AppHost startup checked when orchestration or hosting changed
